_comment: Railway cron services. Create 4 cron services, each with CRON_JOB env var set and CRON_SECRET matching the web service.

crons.name: every-30-min
crons.description: Reconcile orders, check crafting updates, abandoned carts

crons.name: daily-stats
crons.description: Collect daily stats at midnight IST (6:30 PM UTC)

crons.name: morning-digest
crons.description: Morning digest at 8 AM IST (2:30 AM UTC)

crons.name: weekly
crons.description: Weekly rollup + finance Mondays at 9 AM IST (3:30 AM UTC)
